A2_parent_binding_and_corroboration.A2_beam: A2 is selected on its own paired-uplift development surface; it never borrows the parent's absolute return rank.
A2_parent_binding_and_corroboration.binding: Every A2 row binds one exact V5 parent attempt ID and one exact parent-only counterpart ID. The counterpart differs only by removal of the tested A2 context overlay.
A2_parent_binding_and_corroboration.development_uplift: paired parent-minus-counterpart UTC-day mean >0, 5000-replicate day-cluster bootstrap q05>0, and paired coverage>=0.70
A2_parent_binding_and_corroboration.fixed_context_A1_A3_anchor: An A1/A3 legacy fixed-context row may enter the primary development beam only when its exact A2 context counterpart passes development_uplift in that fold. Otherwise it remains an anchor/ablation only.
A2_parent_binding_and_corroboration.outer_evaluation: Freeze parent, counterpart, context and multiplier before outer access; report both absolute parent performance and paired context uplift.
A2_parent_binding_and_corroboration.parent_availability: both ledgers must be valid and use identical parent event IDs before context permission/sizing

attempt_budget.reason: All V4 refinement reserve is converted to additional ex-ante broad space-filling attempts. No outcomes are used to create new economic addresses.

axis_identity.active_mask: Evaluate the axis schema's frozen active_if expression after parent axes are canonicalized. Inactive axes must equal __NA__; any other value is invalid.
axis_identity.canonical_address: Include every declared axis name, canonical value, active boolean, family, translation version, fold-independent economic semantics and contract hashes. Exclude attempt ID, fold, runtime and artifact paths.
axis_identity.duplicate_rule: Equal canonical economic-address hashes are duplicate attempts. Preserve all source rows in multiplicity, but execute only the lexically first V5 attempt ID; later duplicates are unavailable_duplicate_address.

control_allocation.active_control_ids: Use the V2/V3 control definitions whose family includes the quota family, ordered by UTF-8 control_id.
control_allocation.conditional_binding: At runtime a slot binds the frozen candidate occupying its family/fold/beam_rank. Missing candidate makes the slot unavailable_no_candidate; it is not reassigned.
control_allocation.control_attempt_id: sha256(canonical_json({V5 closure hash, family, control_id, outer_fold_id, beam_rank, replicate_index}))
control_allocation.original_800: preserve exact V2 control rows and identities; rebind execution under V3/V5 using the legacy rule
control_allocation.quota_split: For family quota Q and k active control IDs, each receives floor(Q/k) slots; the first Q mod k ordered IDs receive one additional slot.
control_allocation.slot_order: Within a control ID enumerate tuples lexically by outer_fold_id, beam_rank 1..8, replicate_index 0..infinity. Take the first allocated count.

Gower.numeric: absolute difference divided by full registered domain max-min; zero-range axis omitted
Gower.ordered_categorical: absolute declared-level-index difference divided by k-1
Gower.row_distance: arithmetic mean of included axis distances; no included axes=>0

distance_and_complexity.complexity: number of active economic search axes plus number of enabled optional context components plus one when A3 has a nonzero add leg. Do not score which categorical value was chosen. __NA__, __LEGACY_UNSEARCHED__, IDs, hashes and metadata contribute zero.
distance_and_complexity.eligible_axes: all declared economic search axes; exclude IDs, hashes, lineage, fold, runtime and artifact metadata
distance_and_complexity.primary_selection: use the V3 primary plateau radius 0.15, minimum five members and beam width five
distance_and_complexity.robustness_only: compact and broad selection specifications are recomputed after the primary result. They cannot select, replace or promote a candidate.

launch_authority.runtime: V3 renewable checkpoint, memory, disk-reserve, retry, heartbeat and outcome-blind repair rules

legacy_rebinding.execution: Legacy source coordinates are re-executed under the V3 economic contract. The V5 attempt ID, not the historical source ID, is the executable identity.
legacy_rebinding.new_axis_projection: A legacy row receives the value __LEGACY_UNSEARCHED__ for every V4 axis absent from its source schema. This is distinct from an economically inactive __NA__ value.
legacy_rebinding.selection_roles: Legacy rows may serve as source anchors, ablations and ordinary screening nodes. A __LEGACY_UNSEARCHED__ field is excluded from Gower distance and complexity for comparisons among legacy rows, and yields distance 1 against an active searched value.

new_axis_formulas.ATR_window_days: Use the V3 Wilder ATR formula with exactly the registered 10,20,40 or 60 consecutive valid completed UTC daily true ranges; unavailable until the complete window exists.
new_axis_formulas.BTC_ETH_trend_pair_days: For pair a_b, compute each asset's a-day and b-day completed-daily log return fold-training percentiles, average the two percentiles within asset, side-align, then arithmetic-mean BTC and ETH.
new_axis_formulas.BTC_ETH_volatility_lookback_days: Annualized sample_sd of completed-daily log returns over registered N days; use 1-percentile for both sides.
new_axis_formulas.breadth_return_lookback_days: Among known PIT members, fraction whose completed-daily log return over the registered 5,20 or 60 days is >0.

contraction_baselines.adjacent_equal_duration: sample_sd base adjacent 5-minute log returns divided by sample_sd of the immediately preceding equal-duration adjacent-return window
contraction_baselines.trailing_5x_base_duration: sample_sd base adjacent returns divided by sample_sd of the immediately preceding window containing five times the base-duration number of completed bars

new_axis_formulas.dispersion_return_lookback_days: Median absolute deviation from the cross-sectional median of completed-daily log returns over the registered 5,20 or 60 days.
new_axis_formulas.parkinson_volatility: For registered N valid completed UTC daily bars: sqrt((365/(4*ln(2)))*mean((ln(high/low))^2)). Require finite positive high/low and the V3 valid-day rule for every day.
new_axis_formulas.rank_ties: average ranks; percentile=(average_rank-1)/(n-1); n<5 makes the observation unavailable

signal_or_shape_rank_scopes.global_PIT_or_global_side: Pool every PIT-eligible training observation, preserving side separation when named.
signal_or_shape_rank_scopes.liquidity_decile_or_decile_side: Pool observations whose one-day-lagged 30-day median quote-notional PIT decile equals the observation's decile; preserve side separation when named. Minimum five symbols.
signal_or_shape_rank_scopes.parent_liquidity_universe: At each decision, average-rank only members inside the exact parent's registered lagged-liquidity universe.
signal_or_shape_rank_scopes.symbol_or_symbol_side: Empirical Type-7 time-series percentile from the exact symbol or symbol-side fold-training population.

pairwise_coverage.claim_rule: Unrepresented or thin regions cap family-exhaustion claims and are future-search gaps. They do not permit adding hidden attempts after outcomes.
pairwise_coverage.definitions: For each pair of categorical active axes, count each valid level pair among the 6,144 new addresses. Rows where either axis is __NA__ or __LEGACY_UNSEARCHED__ do not enter that pair's denominator.

requirements: rebuild all 9,665 attempt rows and 1,600 controls twice with byte-identical outputs
replay Sobol stream indices and canonical addresses independently
map every V4 axis value to one formula or explicit metadata-only role
prove all inactive-axis values obey active_if and sentinel rules
prove every A2 parent and counterpart identity exists
reconcile control quotas and every conditional slot
recompute Gower and complexity from an independent validator
run synthetic ledgers covering every new axis level and each control family
preoutcome_gate.review: One consolidated independent review must inspect all nine prior blocked categories. If another unresolved economic semantic exists, return the full remaining list in one report before outcomes.

sobol_generation.block_algorithm: For block b=0,1,... create a fresh scrambled Sobol engine with the family seed, fast_forward(b*4096), then call random_base2(12) to obtain exactly 4096 points. Process points in block/index order. Canonicalize dependencies, reject logically invalid rows, source-address duplicates and earlier V5 duplicates, but every examined point retains its stream index. Continue blocks until the family quota of unique valid addresses is filled.
sobol_generation.coverage: Marginal, pairwise, discrepancy and nearest-neighbor coverage are mandatory diagnostics only. They do not regenerate, select, reject, or reorder attempts.
sobol_generation.dimension_order: For each family, order all V4 search-axis names by UTF-8 lexical order. Conditional axes remain dimensions; inactive values are canonicalized to __NA__ after dependency evaluation.
sobol_generation.failure: if 64 blocks do not fill a family quota, stop packet construction and report the valid-domain defect
sobol_generation.implementation_binding: Record Python, scipy, Sobol direction-number table and scipy source-file SHA-256 in the packet. The independent reviewer must replay the exact rows byte-for-byte.
sobol_generation.level_order: Use the literal value order in the V4 axis declaration. Do not alphabetize axis values.
sobol_generation.point_mapping: For an axis with k declared levels, index=min(floor(u*k),k-1). Continuous axes, if any, use the declared closed interval affine mapping and canonical 15-significant-digit decimal serialization.
sobol_generation.selection: first required unique valid addresses in stream order; no outcome-free coverage optimizer changes their order

supersession: V5 supersedes V4 wherever V4 called for Sobol continuation, adaptive refinement, pairwise-coverage regeneration, or undefined V4 identity/distance/control allocation. V3 economic/accounting semantics and V4 economic search axes remain binding.
